title: geranium viscosissimum var. nervosum
intro: Geranium viscosissimum var. nervosum, also known as the hairy-stemmed geranium, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its hairy stems and clusters of pink to purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Geranium viscosissimum var. nervosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health concerns, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
